summary: Classified the ten live open PR inventory items independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and no close/merge/fix actions are planned because the hydrated fix artifact disables instant close, low-signal PR closeout, merge, fix, and raise_pr for this shard.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR with passed proof and linked bug context; not closable or mergeable by this job.
Standalone feature PR with missing proof; keep open for normal author/maintainer follow-up.
Independent docs PR; low-signal closeout is disabled and the PR remains for maintainer review.
Related Codex timeout diagnostics PR with rebase/proof blockers; not safe to close as duplicate or superseded from this artifact.
Useful but blocked browser doctor PR tied to an open issue; keep related and open for proof/rebase/maintainer follow-up.
Independent docs PR; no close action is allowed or warranted in this inventory shard.
Useful related follow-up PR in an already-touched CLI logs area; keep open for maintainer review.
Candidate PR for an open linked Feishu bug, but this inventory shard can only keep it open and related.
Related Slack product/bug PR with open linked issue and product-review context; keep open for maintainer decision.
Independent useful contributor PR with review/rebase blockers; keep open rather than close.
